news.title: 82-year-old hit, killed by tractor-trailer after pulling over for towing issues on I-20
news.summary: Deputies responded to a crash involving a pedestrian near Exit 101 on Thursday morning. The pedestrian died at the scene.

news.title: Former DeKalb County officer accused of killing 19-year-old during investigation released on bond
news.summary: A former DeKalb County officer accused of shooting and killing a teenager while investigating an armed robbery on Tuesday night is no longer at the county jail.

news.title: 2 Georgia fugitives arrested during traffic stop
news.summary: A metro Atlanta man wanted on a felony warrant was arrested during a traffic stop in North Carolina, according to authorities.

news.title: Suspect in ‘Casino Life’ rhinestone sweatshirt wanted in 33-year-old’s shooting
news.summary: The Atlanta Police Department’s Aggravated Assault Unit is trying to identify a suspect in a shooting that injured a 33-year-old man.

news.title: Affidavit: DeKalb officer accidentally shot 19-year-old in the back while he was cuffing him on the ground
news.summary: Derrick Harris Jr. was terminated from the DeKalb County Police Department in the case and faces charges of felony involuntary manslaughter and reckless conduct.

news.title: 61-year-old caught on video performing lewd act in front of child at Decatur Library
news.summary: Police said it occurred on the second floor of the library on July 6.

news.title: No charges for APD officer in fatal South Fulton shooting outside bar
news.summary: Fulton County prosecutors have closed their investigation without charging Atlanta Police Officer Melvin Potter in the 2024 fatal shooting of Devon Anderson.

news.title: Murder convictions upheld for 2 men in 2022 Gwinnett County carjacking
news.summary: Two gang members convicted in a deadly Peachtree Corners carjacking lost their appeals before the Georgia Supreme Court.

news.title: Body found 'severely decomposed' floating in river in Cartersville
news.summary: Once the body was taken out of the water, police said they noticed the right hand was missing.

news.title: Fatal pedestrian crash temporarily shuts down I-20 east in Newton County
news.summary: All eastbound lanes of Interstate 20 near Exit 101 were temporarily closed Thursday morning as deputies investigate a fatal pedestrian incident.

news.title: Therapy center worker charged with child cruelty after alleged attack on teen with autism
news.summary: Police have charged a therapy worker with child cruelty, accused of violently attacking a 16-year-old boy with autism at a facility in Alpharetta.

news.title: Atlanta smash-and-grab: Masked men ram U-Haul into clothing store
news.summary: Three masked men are on the run after ramming a U-Haul truck into an Atlanta clothing store during a Wednesday morning smash-and-grab burglary.

news.title: DeKalb County officer terminated, facing charges after 19-year-old shot and killed
news.summary: The GBI said the officer will be booked into the DeKalb County Jail once he is in custody.

news.title: Douglas County leaders just killed a massive data center project
news.summary: Douglas County leaders rejected a massive data center development following an intense public hearing filled with heavy community pushback.

news.title: Man arrested for killing wife, shooting son in domestic incident in Smyrna, police say
news.summary: Police responded to a home on Laurel Creek Trail near Smyrna around 7:55 p.m. and found a woman dead inside the home and a man shot outside the home.
